title: Tragacantha mesoleios
taxonomy: Tragacantha mesoleios belongs to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as legume or pea family. It is a type of plant that is part of the subfamily Faboideae. The genus Tragacantha is often classified as a synonym for Astragalus, which is a large and diverse genus of flowering plants. Therefore, Tragacantha mesoleios is often considered a synonym for Astragalus species. The classification of Tragacantha mesoleios may vary depending on the source and the most recent taxonomic research.
uses: Tragacantha mesoleios, also known as the spiny needle bush, has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory properties.
